g.text: Macro Properties Toronto sold this 143-unit portfolio to Epiphany Group for
$14,000,000 or $97,902.09 per unit. The buyer was drawn to purchasing
these properties to diversity and strengthen their investment portfolio. The net
operating income in 2024 was reported to be $838,909, yielding a 5.99% cap
1101, 1121 109 St, North Battleford, Saskatchewan | File VAL251012 - 1
